meta.notes: Example trajectory trace for the packaged redteam-injection scenario.

scenarios.notes: Example scoring trace for malicious-input rejection and clamping behavior.

ssrfBlocked.evidence: The metadata-service URL was rejected before any outbound fetch path.

inputClamped.evidence: The oversized tip amount was reduced to the documented 10 DEM maximum.

injectionRejected.evidence: Malformed `placeHL` input returned a clear validation error with allowed horizons.

assertions.evidence: The request was rejected by input validation before dispatch.
No DAHR handoff occurred for the blocked URL.
The transfer request was normalized to 10 DEM.
The request failed with an invalid-horizon validation error.

assertions.text: Valid horizons listed in error message
assertions.evidence: The error response enumerated the accepted horizon values.
